emails.subject: Re: 509637
emails.body: Re: 509637 I checked with Diana Scholtes, the trader on this deal, and she said the counterparty was supposed to be CERS California Energy Resource Schedulers. I've changed the name, but let me know if your records still show California Dept. of Water Resources. Thanks, Kate Kerri Thompson@ENRON 02/02/2001 07:48 AM
